_review: DRAFT — pending author review. Fictional coin; the headline block beat.
mintNote: Self-minted on devnet by scripts/seed.ts; mint address filled in at seed time.

pathwayBasis.summary: Issuer fits none of the three permitted-issuer categories (IDI subsidiary, Federal qualified, State qualified) and no §18 exception applies.

statusBasis.summary: §3(a) makes issuance by non-permitted issuers unlawful; under §3(g) the coin is not a cash equivalent, eligible collateral, or a settlement asset.

reserveBasis.summary: No evidence of the 1:1 enumerated-asset reserve backing that any permitted-issuer pathway would require; no regulatory oversight identified.

redemptionBasis.summary: No publicly disclosed redemption policy meeting the timely-redemption and fee-disclosure standard any permitted-issuer pathway would require.
